{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230321457B7FFA4E9C63EBBF62AF"}"},"total":137},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7618571097032475454","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"我很少写书评的，不过这次想写。
一直以来都很喜欢看九叔的僵尸片，在我看来他就是电影中唯一的主角，不是说别的角色没有魅力，而是他的魅力远远大于别的角色，至少在我的视角里，他就是这么一个人，能够为徒弟兜底，能够带给人安全感的一个人。
他有血有肉，沉稳大气却不失可爱的人。一直以来，他的电影里徒弟有好几个，不过都不太靠谱，顽皮捣蛋，灵机一动的后果挺可怕的，总要师傅擦屁股却不知悔改，甚至老在背后蛐蛐师父。
我觉得九叔虽然有时抠门，可对待徒弟完全算不上严苛，真正严苛的师父会让人畏惧，他真的是个很好很好的师父，把徒弟当做自己的孩子一样照顾，可是他的徒弟总是轻易被蛊惑。我一直都想着如果有一个人能够毫无怨念的珍爱他，就像真正的亲人那般，那一定会很美好。
我很喜欢这本书，方启人物鲜明，有独特的人格魅力，不是强行装x，金手指没有开很大，不油腻，也不是套路升级流，剧情流畅自然，能够把这么多僵尸片梳理流畅的作者大大很厉害，希望作者大大能够坚持写下去！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773840720,"group_id":"7609607882551610392","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"翻过的书很多。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5iRb5pt7jP9Tc1JD2WI8egDeZfl/je6NC1nQOulSiBh","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"1132928094976051","user_name":"椹之菓"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1132928094976051","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7609607882551610392","book_info":{"abstract":"（本书慢节奏，九叔戏份多，主角不单飞，有福同享）
方启这辈子就俩愿望：收租、躺平、混吃等死到一百岁。
直到一个从天而降的行李箱，把他砸进了九叔的僵尸世界。
好消息：被茅山大师兄石坚亲手救下，他把方启交给了九叔抚养。
坏消息：方启欠他一条命。
从此，方启的人生目标被迫更新：一边在九叔的严厉的教导下成长，一边琢磨着怎么把自家那位随时可能黑化的大师伯从鬼门关前拉回来。
行吧。
这个家，没他得散。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dca33b68bcaf2cbe94e79ed91f886df6","author":"Mo疯","author_id":"","book_id":"7609607882551610392","book_name":"九叔：从被石坚救下开始","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#183030","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"16万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":751,"name":"悬疑灵异","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=751&name=悬疑灵异&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":10,"name":"悬疑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=10&name=悬疑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":100,"name":"灵异","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=100&name=灵异&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":383,"name":"九叔","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=383&name=九叔&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1455,"name":"风水秘术","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1455&name=风水秘术&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7609888922033717784","read_count":"159260","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"289664"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.1","serial_count":"72","tags":"悬疑灵异,悬疑,灵异,九叔,同人,风水秘术","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o50820eb635c9b34cf495032e819214d8~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779391305&x-signature=9kyUjSgKUMcPViC%2ByGRldla1%2BKw%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1113160240867432","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"59"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230321457B7FFA4E9C63EBBF62AF"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":14,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_
